title: Your Story, Our Story
snippet: This cup is known to be a Kiddush Cup and has been passed down through generations of my family. It began with my great grandfather, William Miller who traveled to Israel with my great grandmother over 60 years ago.

title: An Unusually Large Silver Lidded Kiddush Cup and Plate,
snippet: An Unusually Large Silver Lidded Kiddush Cup and Plate, Iraq, 19th CenturyEngraved with stylized palmette motifs, the lid fitted with a bird finial and the plate engraved with a dove.
